title: Inverness to Lapland Charter Flights Scheduled for 2026

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Inverness Airport has announced the return of its festive charter flight to Finnish Lapland, scheduled for 19 December 2026. This announcement follows the success of two sold-out flights operated in 2025, which has encouraged the airline to offer the service again.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The charter flights to Finnish Lapland have gained popularity among holidaymakers seeking winter experiences, particularly during the festive season. The return of this service reflects ongoing demand and promotes regional tourism for Inverness and its surrounding areas.

sourceReferences.citationText: hial-airports – Lapland from Inverness returns for 2026
